revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Caution here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Mbox | name = Caution | demospace = {{{demospace|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = style | image = {{#if:{{{image|}}} |[[File:{{{image}}}|{{{imagesize|40px}}}|Caution|link={{{imagelink|}}}]] |[[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|{{{imagesize|40px}}}|Caution|link={{{imagelink|}}}]]}} | small = {{{small|}}} | smallimage = {{#if:{{{image|}}} |[[File:{{{image}}}|{{{imagesize|40px}}}|Caution|link={{{imagelink|}}}]] |[[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|30px|Caution|link={{{imagelink|}}}]]}} | imageright = {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} |{{{imageright}}} |{{#if:{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|}}}}}} |{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|}}}}}}|{{{shortcut2|}}}|{{{shortcut3|}}}|{{{shortcut4|}}}|{{{shortcut5|}}}}}}} }} | textstyle = {{{textstyle|{{{align|text-align: {{#if:{{{center|}}}|center|left}};}}}}}} | text = {{#if:{{{header|{{{heading|{{{title|}}}}}}}}} |
'''{{{header|{{{heading|{{{title|}}}}}}}}}'''
}}{{{text|{{{content|{{{reason|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} }}{{Editnotice EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE}}{{Documentation}}
